bundle.longDescription: Embedded WebView2 shell for the kaspa-stratum-bridge dashboard.

security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdn.tailwindcss.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdn.tailwindcss.com; img-src 'self' data: https: http:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* http://[::1]:* https:; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* http://[::1]:* https: ws: wss:;
